title: Review of AI–IoT frameworks for modular integrated construction: Toward zero-waiting coordination
abstract: Modular Integrated Construction (MiC) increasingly relies on real-time coordination across design, production, transportation, and installation. However, current practices remain constrained by fragmented data, inconsistent semantics, and limited cross-stage feedback. This paper examines how AI-IoT technologies can jointly support zero-waiting coordination, aiming to minimize avoidable delays and maintain consistent workflow under dynamic conditions. A mixed-review approach integrating bibliometric, systematic review, and thematic-coding was conducted on 79 articles following Preferred Reporting Items for Systematic Reviews and Meta-Analyses. The findings organize existing advances into four functional domains: cyber-physical sensing for continuous state capture, intelligent-analytics for prediction and interpretation, semantic-integration for cross-stage data alignment, and adaptive-decision coordination for feedback-driven regulation. The review also clarifies the mechanisms that link these domains and identifies gaps that hinder the integration of processes. By synthesizing fragmented developments into a process-oriented framework, this paper enhances current understanding and provides practical insights for developing reliable AI-IoT-enabled coordination strategies in MiC. • AI-IoT components jointly enable continuous sensing, prediction, and feedback across MiC stages. • Unified semantic integration enhances cross-stage data interoperability for real-time MiC coordination. • Intelligent analytics support takt stability through dynamic bottleneck prediction and adaptive scheduling. • Real-time sensing improves installation accuracy, risk detection, and module alignment reliability. • Integrated AI-IoT framework strengthens zero-waiting flow through synchronized lifecycle information exchange.
title_cn: AI–IoT框架在模块化集成建筑中的综述：迈向零等待协调
abstract_cn:
模块化集成建造（MiC）越来越依赖于设计、生产、运输和安装之间的实时协调。然而，当前的实践仍受到数据碎片化、语义不一致和跨阶段反馈有限的制约。本文探讨了人工智能-物联网（AI-IoT）技术如何共同支持零等待协调，旨在最小化可避免的延误，并在动态条件下保持一致的工作流程。基于对79篇文章的混合审查方法，结合了文献计量学、系统综述和主题编码，遵循系统评价和荟萃分析优先报告项目（PRISMA）的要求。研究结果将现有进展组织为四个功能领域：用于持续状态捕捉的网络物理传感、用于预测和解释的智能分析、用于跨阶段数据对齐的语义集成，以及用于反馈驱动调节的自适应决策协调。该综述还阐明了连接这些领域的机制，并识别了阻碍过程整合的空白。通过将碎片化的发展整合为一个面向过程的框架，本文增强了对当前理解的认识，并为开发可靠的AI-IoT支持的MiC协调策略提供了实用见解。 
• AI-IoT组件联合实现MiC各阶段的持续感知、预测和反馈。 
• 统一的语义集成提升了实时MiC协调的跨阶段数据互操作性。 
• 智能分析通过动态瓶颈预测和自适应调度支持节拍稳定性。 
• 实时感知提高了安装精度、风险检测和模块对齐可靠性。 
• 集成的AI-IoT框架通过同步生命周期信息交换，加强了零等待流动。

title: Multimodal dynamic feature fusion framework for human–robot audio-visual interaction in complex construction conditions
title_cn: 复杂建设条件下人机音视频交互的多模态动态特征融合框架

title: Urban areas have higher heat exposure, but rural areas face greater exposure inequality
title_cn: 城市地区面临更高的热暴露，但农村地区则面临更大的暴露不平等。

title: The silent transmission belt: testing safety bullying's indirect effects on construction incident learning failures via voice suppression
abstract: Purpose This study aims to conduct a theoretical reconstruction of the phenomenon of failure to learn from incidents (FLFI) in construction projects by conceptualizing safety bullying (SB) not as episodic interpersonal misconduct, but as an institutionalized governance mechanism that structurally suppresses voice. We examine how project participant silence (PPS) operates as the transmission channel through which coercive control cultures translate managerial pressure into learning breakdowns, thereby challenging dominant explanations that attribute learning failure primarily to weak implementation or individual error. Design/methodology/approach Data from 215 valid questionnaires were analyzed using partial least squares structural equation modeling (PLS-SEM). The structural model's stability was verified via a bootstrapping procedure with 3,000 resamples. Findings PPS exerts a significant and substantial effect on FLFI. SB shows no direct impact on learning outcomes but operates entirely through PPS, indicating a full mediation effect. This indirect-only pattern reveals that learning failures emerge when governance-induced silence distorts feedback loops and fragments safety knowledge flows. Originality/value The study advances theory by reframing learning failure as a systemic managerial pathology rather than an implementation deficit. By identifying PPS as a structural inhibitor embedded in temporary project governance, it bridges organizational silence research with resilience engineering and extends high-reliability organization theory into project-based contexts. Practically, it shifts managerial focus from correcting frontline errors to redesigning silence-producing governance structures.
title_cn: 沉默的传输带：通过声音压制测试安全欺凌对建筑事故学习失败的间接影响
abstract_cn: 目的 本研究旨在对施工项目中未能从事件中学习的现象（FLFI）进行理论重构，将安全欺凌（SB）概念化为一种体制化的治理机制，而不是偶发的跨人际不当行为。我们考察项目参与者沉默（PPS）如何作为一种传导渠道，通过它，强制控制文化将管理压力转化为学习的断裂，从而挑战将学习失败主要归因于执行薄弱或个人错误的主流解释。设计/方法论/方式 采用部分最小二乘结构方程模型（PLS-SEM）分析215份有效问卷的数据。通过3000次重抽样的自助法验证了结构模型的稳定性。研究结果 PPS对FLFI产生显著且实质性的影响。SB对学习结果没有直接影响，而是完全通过PPS发挥作用，表明存在完全中介效应。这种仅间接的模式表明，当治理引起的沉默扭曲反馈循环并碎片化安全知识流时，学习失败就会出现。原创性/价值 本研究通过重新框定学习失败为一种系统性的管理病态，而非实施缺陷，推动了理论的发展。通过将PPS识别为嵌入于临时项目治理中的结构性抑制因素，研究将组织沉默研究与韧性工程结合起来，并拓展了高可靠性组织理论在基于项目的背景中的适用性。从实践角度来看，它将管理者的关注点从纠正前线错误转移到重新设计导致沉默的治理结构上。

title: Feeling bad, learning fast and helping out: how growth mindset shapes construction workers' helping behaviors after mistakes
abstract: Purpose Work errors cause operational disruptions and predict distinct behavioral responses among workers. Despite the traditional view of work errors as purely detrimental, limited research has explored their potential to relate to helping behavior, which is critical for mitigating error cascades and maintaining team cohesion in construction settings. This study examines the relationship between work errors and helping behavior among construction workers, the mediating role of self-blame and prosocial motivation and the moderating role of growth mindset. Design/methodology/approach 386 construction workers completed a critical-incident recall task. SPSS, Mplus and the PROCESS macro were used to analyze mediation, moderation and moderated mediation effects. Findings Findings reveal that work errors are positively associated with helping behavior among construction workers. This relationship is mediated by self-blame and prosocial motivation. Moreover, the growth mindset significantly moderates the indirect path from work errors to helping behavior via prosocial motivation, whereas it does not significantly moderate the indirect path via self-blame. Originality/value This study extends error management and safety culture research by shifting the theoretical focus from error prevention to the proactive “error-to-helping” transition. While traditional views frame errors as purely detrimental failures, we apply affective events theory to conceptualize them as catalysts for organizational citizenship behavior (OCB), specifically helping behavior. This research clarifies how work errors are related to dual psychological paths: self-blame and prosocial motivation. Furthermore, because these psychological mechanisms are rooted in the high-stakes, safety-centric nature of the work, the model has high transferability to other similar high-risk industries, such as mining and manufacturing, where individual accountability and mutual support are equally critical for maintaining operational safety.
title_cn: 感到不适、快速学习与互助：成长心态如何影响建筑工人在犯错后的帮助行为
abstract_cn:
目的 工作错误导致操作中断，并预测工人之间不同的行为反应。尽管传统观点认为工作错误完全是有害的，但关于它们如何与帮助行为相关的研究较为有限，而帮助行为在减轻错误级联和维护建筑环境中的团队凝聚力方面至关重要。本研究旨在探讨建筑工人工作错误与帮助行为之间的关系，自责和亲社会动机的中介作用，以及成长心态的调节作用。

设计/方法论/步骤 386名建筑工人完成了一项关键事件回忆任务。采用SPSS、Mplus和PROCESS宏进行中介、调节及调节中介效应的分析。

发现 研究发现，工作错误与建筑工人之间的帮助行为呈正相关。这一关系受到自责和亲社会动机的中介作用。此外，成长心态显著调节了工作错误通过亲社会动机影响帮助行为的间接路径，而对通过自责影响的间接路径并没有显著调节作用。

原创性/价值 本研究通过将理论重点从错误预防转向主动的“错误到帮助”转变，扩展了错误管理和安全文化研究。虽然传统观点将错误框定为完全有害的失败，但我们应用情感事件理论，将错误概念化为组织公民行为（OCB），特别是帮助行为的催化剂。本研究澄清了工作错误如何与自责和亲社会动机这两条心理路径相关。此外，由于这些心理机制植根于高风险、安全导向的工作性质，该模型在其他类似高风险行业（如采矿和制造业）中具有高度的可转移性，在这些行业中，个人责任和相互支持对于维护操作安全同样至关重要。

title: Through the client's lens: factors impacting project document quality in the South African construction industry
abstract: Purpose This research explores the factors that affect the quality of project documentation in South Africa's construction industry, focusing on the perspectives of public sector clients. It aims to address a gap in existing research by showing how these factors influence document quality. Design/methodology/approach This study uses a qualitative multiple-case study design to explore factors affecting project document quality from the perspective of public sector clients in South Africa. Four government organisations were selected as individual cases to enable cross-case comparison and uncover both common and context-specific insights. This approach allows for a deeper understanding of complex issues within real-world settings and supports both replication and theoretical exploration. It is particularly suited to examining how clients perceive the role of fees and consultant-related factors in shaping documentation quality. Findings The study found that five key factors influence project document quality from the client's perspective: consultant experience, competence, team composition, procurement systems and work ethic. While experience and competence align with previous research, team composition and procurement practices emerged as new client-driven insights. Additionally, low professional fees were found to constrain resources and time, negatively affecting quality. However, fees alone were not seen as the sole determinant. Rather, the interplay between fees, consultant capabilities and resource allocation was identified as critical to producing high-quality documentation. Originality/value This research offers original value by foregrounding the perspectives of public sector clients, an often overlooked stakeholder group in studies on project document quality. By doing so, it uncovers previously underexplored factors such as team composition, procurement practices and work ethic. The study provides a more holistic understanding of how document quality is influenced, particularly in the context of fee structures and consultant capabilities. Its findings support more balanced procurement approaches and contribute to the construction body of knowledge in developing countries.
title_cn: 透过客户的视角：影响南非建筑行业项目文件质量的因素
abstract_cn: 目的 本研究探讨影响南非建筑行业项目文档质量的因素，重点关注公共部门客户的视角。旨在填补现有研究的空白，展示这些因素如何影响文档质量。 设计/方法论/方法 本研究采用定性多案例研究设计，从南非公共部门客户的角度探讨影响项目文档质量的因素。选择了四个政府组织作为独立案例，以便进行跨案例比较，发现共同的以及特定背景的见解。这种方法能够深入理解现实世界环境中的复杂问题，并同时支持数据复制和理论探索。它特别适合于考察客户如何看待费用和顾问相关因素在塑造文档质量中的作用。 研究发现 研究发现，从客户的角度来看，有五个关键因素影响项目文档质量：顾问经验、能力、团队组成、采购系统和职业道德。虽然经验和能力与以往研究一致，但团队组成和采购实践则作为新的客户驱动见解出现。此外，低专业费用被发现限制了资源和时间，负面影响了质量。然而，费用本身并未被视为唯一决定因素。相反，费用、顾问能力和资源配置之间的相互作用被确定为产生高质量文档的关键。 独创性/价值 这项研究通过突出公共部门客户的视角，提供了独特的价值，这是在项目文档质量研究中常被忽视的利益相关者群体。通过这样做，它揭示了团队组成、采购实践和职业道德等先前未被充分探讨的因素。该研究为文档质量受到影响的更全面理解提供了基础，特别是在费用结构和顾问能力的背景下。它的发现支持更加平衡的采购方法，并为发展中国家的建筑知识体系做出贡献。

title: Mapping a decade of prefabrication policy in Australia: a systematic review of policy mixes from 2015 to 2025
abstract: Purpose The construction sector faces significant environmental and productivity challenges, increasing the need for more sustainable and efficient building methods such as prefabricated construction. However, its adoption in Australia has remained limited due to regulatory constraints and the dominance of traditional building codes. This study provides a systematic policy-focused review that maps the evolution of prefabrication governance across Australian jurisdictions over the past decade. Design/methodology/approach Using a systematic literature review methodology, this study compiled a multi-level dataset of 87 policy measures issued between 2015 and June 2025 from 19 official Commonwealth and state/territory sources. Each measure was coded into five instrument classes: Incentives, Initiatives, Laws/Regulations, Guidance and Standards. This study undertook a longitudinal analysis of policy sequencing and a cross-jurisdictional comparison of instrument mixes. Findings The analysis shows a clear policy trajectory over decade, progressing from foundational standards and code clarifications to regulatory and guidance consolidation and, ultimately, national coordination. Victoria, New South Wales, Queensland and Western Australia demonstrate the broadest and most active instrument portfolios. Originality/value The study contributes the first integrated map of Australia’s prefabrication policy architecture. It introduces a transferable taxonomy of instruments and proposes a phase model of policy sequencing that can support future causal evaluation and practice reform in public housing delivery. The value of this research lies in its potential to inform policymaking and its ability to facilitate the wider adoption of prefabricated construction in Australia. By analysing the regulatory development, this research will have the capability of developing a more sustainable and efficient construction industry within Australia.
title_cn: 澳大利亚预制政策十年走向的地图：2015年至2025年政策组合的系统评审
abstract_cn:
目的 建筑行业面临重大环境和生产力挑战，这增加了对更可持续和高效的建筑方式（如预制建筑）需求的必要性。然而，由于监管限制和传统建筑规范的主导地位，预制建筑在澳大利亚的采纳一直受到限制。本研究提供了一项系统的政策导向回顾，描绘了过去十年中澳大利亚各地区预制建筑治理的演变。 

设计/方法论 本研究采用系统文献回顾的方法，编制了一个多层级数据集，涵盖2015年至2025年6月间自19个官方联邦及州/领地来源发布的87项政策措施。每项措施被编码为五种工具类别：激励、倡议、法律/法规、指导和标准。本研究进行了政策顺序的纵向分析以及跨地区的工具组合比较。 

研究结果 分析显示出清晰的政策轨迹，十年来逐步从基础标准和规范澄清，转向监管和指导的整合，最终实现国家协调。维多利亚州、新南威尔士州、昆士兰州和西澳大利亚州展示了最广泛和最活跃的工具组合。 

原创性/价值 本研究贡献了澳大利亚预制建筑政策架构的首个综合地图。它引入了一个可转移的工具分类法，并提出了一个政策顺序的阶段模型，可以支持未来因果评估及公共住房交付实践改革。本研究的价值在于其能够为政策制定提供参考，并促进预制建筑在澳大利亚的更广泛采纳。通过分析监管的发展，本研究将有能力开发一个更可持续和高效的建筑行业。

journal_name: Journal of Construction Engineering and Management
title: Safety Performance Evaluation Model for Off-Site Construction through the Integration of Key Leading and Lagging Factors
abstract: Off-site construction, a growing alternative to traditional building methods, offers advantages such as reduced environmental impact, improved productivity, and cost efficiency. However, off-site construction introduces new and unique safety challenges across its multiple phases of fabrication, transportation, and assembly. The Experience Modification Rating (EMR), a widely used insurance metric in traditional construction, remains the primary factor used by insurance carriers to adjust workers’ compensation premiums for off-site firms. However, the industry’s reliance on an outdated metric that relies on lagging safety indicators, broad classifications, and other nonsafety factors raises significant concerns over its applicability in reflecting the distinct safety risks and operational contexts of off-site work. Therefore, this research examines the inadequacies of EMR in this sector and identifies 70 key safety factors specific to off-site processes through an extensive literature review of 76 research publications. A structured survey was used to validate the relevance and importance of these factors and was distributed to professionals from both the off-site construction and insurance industries, yielding 30 valid responses. Based on the findings, this paper explores the potential for alternative safety evaluation approaches that are off-site-specific and data-driven and considers all relevant leading and lagging factors. Thus, using the Relative Importance Index (RII), this study establishes 36 validated, high-priority safety metrics, laying the groundwork for future multicriteria-based assessment models tailored to off-site construction. Additionally, applying the Mann–Whitney U test revealed significant intergroup differences in factor prioritization between off-site construction professionals and insurance providers, highlighting key divergences in safety perception.
title_cn: 离场施工安全绩效评估模型：通过关键领先因素和滞后因素的整合
abstract_cn: 现场外建筑作为传统建筑方法的一个日益增长的替代方案，提供了诸如减少环境影响、提高生产力和成本效益等优势。然而，现场外建筑在其多个阶段的制造、运输和组装过程中引入了新的独特安全挑战。经验调整评级（EMR）作为传统建筑中广泛使用的保险指标，仍然是保险公司用来调整现场外公司工人赔偿保险费的主要因素。然而，行业对这一依赖于滞后安全指标、宽泛分类和其他非安全因素的过时指标的依赖，引发了关于其在反映现场外工作特有安全风险和操作背景方面的适用性的重要担忧。因此，本研究考察了EMR在这一领域的不足，并通过对76篇研究出版物进行广泛的文献回顾，识别出了70个特定于现场外过程的关键安全因素。我们采用结构化调查问卷来验证这些因素的相关性和重要性，并将问卷分发给现场外建筑和保险行业的专业人士，共获得30份有效回应。基于研究结果，本文探讨了现场外特定且基于数据的替代安全评估方法的潜力，并考虑了所有相关的前向和滞后因素。因此，利用相对重要性指数（RII），本研究确立了36个经过验证的高优先级安全指标，为未来针对现场外建筑的多标准评估模型奠定了基础。此外，应用曼–惠特尼U检验揭示了现场外建筑专业人士和保险提供者之间在因素优先级上的显著组间差异，突显了安全感知的关键分歧。

journal_name: Journal of Construction Engineering and Management
title: Feasibility of a Wearable 360° Camera for Personalized Proximity Warning on Construction Sites
abstract: Construction sites pose a high risk of struck-by accidents due to limited situational awareness. This study investigates the feasibility of using a neckband-style wearable 360° camera for proximity warning in construction environments. The proposed framework consists of a data preprocessing module—handling motion blur detection and distortion correction—and a hazard detection module, which integrates object detection with depth estimation. By identifying hazardous equipment and estimating its distance, the system provides personalized warnings to workers at risk. Field tests conducted at actual construction sites demonstrated an F1-score of 0.81 in hazard detection. Unlike fixed cameras or sensor-based systems, this approach enables omnidirectional, individualized hazard monitoring without additional site infrastructure. The wearable camera also minimizes interference with tasks, supporting stable image capture. The findings highlight the potential of combining wearable computer vision and deep learning to improve safety in complex and dynamic construction settings.
title_cn: 可穿戴360°相机在建筑工地个性化近距离警告的可行性研究
abstract_cn: 建筑工地由于局限的感知能力而存在较高的被撞击事故风险。本研究探讨了在建筑环境中使用颈带式可穿戴360°摄像头进行接近警告的可行性。所提出的框架包括一个数据预处理模块，用于处理运动模糊检测和畸变修正，以及一个危险检测模块，将物体检测与深度估计相结合。通过识别危险设备并估算其距离，该系统能够向面临风险的工人提供个性化的警示。在实际建筑工地进行的实地测试中，危险检测的F1得分达到了0.81。与固定摄像头或基于传感器的系统不同，这种方法无需额外的现场基础设施，能够实现全方位个性化的危险监控。此外，可穿戴摄像头还最小化了对任务的干扰，支持稳定的图像捕获。研究结果突显了将可穿戴计算机视觉与深度学习相结合以改善复杂动态建筑环境安全性的潜力。

journal_name: Journal of Construction Engineering and Management
title: Two-Stage Optimization Design Framework for Tower Crane Layout Planning in Modular Integrated Construction Considering Transportation Efficiency, Operator Visibility, and Lifting Safety
abstract: With the increasing prevalence of modular integrated construction (MiC) projects, effective tower crane layout planning has become crucial to balance multiple goals, including efficiency and safety. Studies typically focus on single-objective optimization, primarily minimizing total traveling time or cost in conventional construction sites. The larger and heavier components used in MiC necessitate cranes with higher lifting capacity, which complicates planning and raises concerns about lifting safety. This study presents a two-stage optimization design framework for the single-tower crane layout in MiC. First, a multiobjective optimization model was proposed, incorporating considerations of traveling time, visibility, and lifting moment. The mathematical formulation for traveling time was modified to account for module rotation time and the distinct movement features of tower cranes. Second, heuristic algorithms, including the nondominated sorting genetic algorithm III and multiobjective particle swarm optimization, were employed to solve the proposed multiobjective optimization problem. The final optimal layout was determined using the technique for order of preference by similarity to ideal solution method based on varying weights for the model’s objectives. The proposed approach was validated through a case study of a MiC project in Hong Kong. Experimental results demonstrate a 26% increase in hoisting efficiency, a 9.3% improvement in operator visibility, and a 23.8% reduction in total lifting moment compared to the original layout. Additionally, optimizing the initial orientation of the modules leads to a 12.6% improvement in traveling time. To further support decision-making, a user interface system was developed, enabling planners to make informed choices during the planning process. This study provides a structured and practical approach for optimizing tower crane layouts in modular construction projects, integrating efficiency and safety considerations. By offering practitioners tools to achieve customized layout solutions during the preconstruction stage, this framework significantly enhances the planning process for MiC projects.
title_cn: 考虑运输效率、操作员视野和起重安全的模块化集成建筑塔式起重机布局规划的双阶段优化设计框架
abstract_cn: 随着模块化集成建筑（MiC）项目的日益普及，有效的塔吊布置规划变得尤为重要，以平衡多重目标，包括效率和安全性。现有研究通常集中于单一目标的优化，主要是在传统建筑工地上最小化总行驶时间或成本。然而，MiC中使用的大型和重型组件需要更高起重能力的起重机，这使得规划变得更加复杂，并引发了对起重安全性的担忧。本研究提出了一种用于MiC单塔吊布置的两阶段优化设计框架。首先，提出了一个多目标优化模型，考虑了行驶时间、可视性和吊载力矩等因素。为了考虑模块旋转时间以及塔吊独特的运动特点，对行驶时间的数学公式进行了修改。其次，采用了启发式算法，包括非支配排序遗传算法III和多目标粒子群优化，来解决所提出的多目标优化问题。最终最佳布局是通过理想解相似度优先排序法在模型目标的不同权重基础上确定的。通过对香港一个MiC项目的案例研究，验证了所提出的方法。实验结果表明，与原始布局相比，吊装效率提高了26%，操作员可视性改善了9.3%，总吊载力矩降低了23.8%。此外，优化模块的初始朝向能够使行驶时间改善12.6%。为了进一步支持决策，开发了用户界面系统，使规划者在规划过程中能够做出明智的选择。本研究为模块化建筑项目中的塔吊布局优化提供了一种结构化且实用的方法，整合了效率和安全性考虑。通过为从业者提供工具，以实现定制化的布局解决方案，在施工前阶段显著提升了MiC项目的规划过程。

journal_name: Journal of Construction Engineering and Management
title: Advancing Mental Health Management in Construction Using Neurophysiological Approaches: A Systematic Review
abstract: Mental health issues are increasingly recognized as critical concerns in the construction industry. While traditional assessment methods rely on subjective self-reports, emerging neuropsychological tools offer objective and real-time measures of workers’ psychological states. However, there is limited understanding of how these tools have been applied to manage mental health for construction workers in the existing literature. Therefore, this study aims to examine the application of neurophysiological tools in managing the mental health of construction workers through a systematic review. A systematic search was conducted and 41 eligible studies were reviewed. The results were categorized based on a conceptual framework including four domains: appraisal of stressors, assessment of psychophysiological outcomes, coping interventions, and outcomes of mental health conditions. The findings revealed that (1) most studies focused on the assessment of psychophysiological outcomes, particularly stress, emotional states, and mental fatigue, demonstrating the feasibility of applying neurophysiological methods to capturing real-time psychological responses; (2) few studies addressed the appraisal of stressors or coping interventions, revealing a critical gap in understanding how construction workers perceive and manage stress in real time; and (3) electroencephalography (EEG) emerged as the most widely used method in measuring diverse mental health conditions, while the increasing adoption of multimodal integration highlights a growing trend toward more comprehensive, reliable, and accurate assessments of workers’ mental states. A key contribution of this study is the development of one of the first integrative frameworks linking neuropsychological tools with holistic mental health management in construction. It advances the current state of knowledge by clarifying the distinct role of physiological metrics (i.e., detection, monitoring, validation, and association) across four domains and offering an in-depth understanding of the practical applicability of neuropsychological methods in assessing mental health conditions. The framework also provides a practical guide for applying neurophysiological tools in mental health management of construction workers for both researchers and practitioners.
title_cn: 在建筑领域推进心理健康管理的神经生理学方法：系统综述
abstract_cn: 心理健康问题在建筑行业中越来越被视为关键问题。传统的评估方法依赖于主观自我报告，而新兴的神经心理工具则提供了工人心理状态的客观和实时测量。然而，目前文献中对这些工具如何用于管理建筑工人的心理健康的理解仍然有限。因此，本研究旨在通过系统评估，探讨神经生理工具在管理建筑工人心理健康中的应用。我们进行了系统搜索，审查了41项符合条件的研究。结果根据一个包括四个领域的概念框架进行了分类：压力源评估、心理生理结果评估、应对干预和心理健康状况结果。研究发现：(1) 大多数研究集中于心理生理结果的评估，特别是压力、情绪状态和心理疲劳，证明应用神经生理方法捕捉实时心理反应的可行性；(2) 很少有研究涉及压力源评估或应对干预，揭示了在理解建筑工人如何实时感知和管理压力方面的关键空白；(3) 脑电图（EEG）成为测量多种心理健康状态最广泛使用的方法，而日益增加的多模态整合的采用，体现了针对工人心理状态的评估向更加全面、可靠和准确的趋势发展。本研究的一个重要贡献是建立了第一个整合框架之一，将神经心理工具与建筑行业的整体心理健康管理联系起来。该框架通过阐明生理指标在压力源评估、心理生理结果评估、应对干预和心理健康状况结果四个领域中的独特作用，推动了当前知识水平的发展，并提供了对神经心理方法在评估心理健康状况中的实际适用性的深入理解。此外，该框架还为研究人员和从业人员提供了在建筑工人心理健康管理中应用神经生理工具的实用指南。

journal_name: Journal of Construction Engineering and Management
title: Effects of BIM Application Maturity on Cooperative Behavior in Construction Projects: The Mediating Role of Relational Governance
title_cn: 建筑项目中BIM应用成熟度对合作行为的影响：关系治理的中介作用

journal_name: Journal of Construction Engineering and Management
title: SolarisBIM.AI: Smart Sustainable Building Planning with BIM-Based Solar-Production Estimation Using Machine-Learning Radiation Forecasts
abstract: Urban expansion, driven by economic and technological development, has intensified building construction and increased energy demand. Over the last decade, this trend has become a global challenge due to the depletion of fossil fuel reserves and the environmental impacts associated with greenhouse gas emissions. As a result, integrating renewable energy sources has become essential for achieving sustainable development goals. Among the available alternatives, photovoltaic energy stands out as a solution to meet the growing energy demand in buildings. In this context, this study presents SolarisBIM.AI, a framework that integrates machine learning–based solar radiation forecasting with a Dynamo routine within a Building Information Modeling (BIM) environment to quantify solar energy produced and CO2 avoided. Three predictive approaches were tested: extreme gradient boosting (XGBoost), long short-term memory networks (LSTMs), and feedforward neural networks (FNNs). Using a 49-year historical solar radiation series from six cities in Pernambuco, Brazil, the FNN achieved the best performance. In a real case study, SolarisBIM.AI predicted an annual solar energy production of 381,802 kWh for 2023, only a 2% overestimation compared with the measured production of 374,204 kWh at the center for technology and geosciences (CTG) UFPE building. This close agreement reinforces the model’s suitability for early-stage design assessments and decision-making in building energy planning. These results demonstrate that the proposed approach can support architects, engineers, and planners in quantifying solar energy production and assessing building sustainability at the design stage.
title_cn: SolarisBIM.AI：基于BIM的太阳能产量估算与机器学习辐射预测相结合的智能可持续建筑规划
abstract_cn: 城市扩张受经济和技术发展的驱动，建筑施工加剧，能源需求上升。在过去十年中，由于化石燃料储备的枯竭以及与温室气体排放相关的环境影响，这一趋势已成为全球挑战。因此，整合可再生能源成为实现可持续发展目标的必然选择。在众多可选替代方案中，光伏能源作为满足建筑能源需求不断增长的解决方案脱颖而出。在此背景下，本研究提出了SolarisBIM.AI，一个将基于机器学习的太阳辐射预测与建筑信息建模（BIM）环境中的Dynamo例程相结合的框架，用以量化产生的太阳能和避免的二氧化碳排放。测试了三种预测方法：极端梯度提升（XGBoost）、长短期记忆网络（LSTM）和前馈神经网络（FNN）。利用来自巴西伯南布哥州六个城市的49年历史太阳辐射数据系列，FNN取得了最佳性能。在一个实际案例研究中，SolarisBIM.AI预测2023年的年太阳能产量为381,802 kWh，与位于科技与地球科学中心（CTG）UFPE建筑中测得的374,204 kWh产量相比，仅有2%的高估。这一接近的一致性进一步加强了模型在建筑能源规划的初步设计评估和决策中的适用性。这些结果表明，所提出的方法可以支持建筑师、工程师和规划师在设计阶段量化太阳能生产并评估建筑的可持续性。

journal_name: Journal of Construction Engineering and Management
title: LLM-QueryBC: An LLM-Based Regulation Query System for Textual and Tabular Information in Building Codes
abstract: The process of querying building codes has long been time-consuming and labor-intensive, requiring extensive manual effort to repeatedly consult and confirm regulations throughout design and review phases. Existing regulation query systems are limited to simple searches, often resulting in errors and failing to provide intelligent responses to users. Although the emergence of large language models (LLMs) offers potential solutions due to their natural language processing abilities, they face challenges such as insufficient domain knowledge, semantic misalignment, and difficulties in handling complex tabular data. To address these limitations, we propose a novel system, LLMs Query Building Codes (LLM-QueryBC), which integrates LLMs with a semantic network–enhanced retrieval-augmented generation (SN-RAG) for text-based queries and a specialized agent called Agent for Tables in Building Codes (TaBCe) for tabular queries. TaBCe leverages the Reasoning and Acting (ReAct) framework, think-by-structure planning method, RAG, computational tools, and a memory module to enhance its functionality. The system autonomously determines internal logic, invokes external tools, and mitigates hallucination issues associated with LLMs in the building code domain. We evaluated our system using fire safety regulations—a critical domain due to its impact on life safety, property protection, and legal compliance. Experimental results demonstrated significant improvements: textual query accuracy increased by 24%, and tabular query accuracy rose by 25%. Additionally, we conducted a case study involving fire safety code queries for a real-world design of a mixed-use high-rise building, further validating the system’s practical applicability. These advancements offer greater value to users and promote broader adoption of intelligent regulation query systems.
title_cn: LLM-QueryBC：一种基于大型语言模型的建筑法规文本和表格信息查询系统
abstract_cn: 查询建筑规范的过程长期以来都是耗时且劳动密集的，要求在设计和评审阶段进行大量手动工作，以反复咨询和确认相关法规。现有的法规查询系统仅限于简单搜索，常导致错误，并未能向用户提供智能响应。尽管大型语言模型（LLMs）的出现因其自然语言处理能力提供了潜在的解决方案，但它们面临诸如领域知识不足、语义不一致以及处理复杂表格数据的困难等挑战。为了解决这些局限性，我们提出了一种新颖的系统——LLMs查询建筑规范（LLM-QueryBC），该系统将LLMs与通过语义网络增强的检索-生成（SN-RAG）相结合，以处理基于文本的查询，并利用一个名为建筑规范表格代理（TaBCe）的专用代理来处理表格查询。TaBCe利用推理与行动（ReAct）框架、结构化思维规划方法、RAG、计算工具和记忆模块来增强其功能。该系统能够自主确定内部逻辑，调用外部工具，并减少与LLMs在建筑规范领域相关的幻觉问题。我们使用消防安全法规对系统进行了评估——这是一个由于其对生命安全、财产保护和法律合规的影响而至关重要的领域。实验结果显示显著改善：文本查询的准确性提高了24%，表格查询的准确性上升了25%。此外，我们还进行了一个案例研究，涉及针对真实世界的混合用途高层建筑设计的消防安全规范查询，进一步验证了该系统的实际适用性。这些进展为用户提供了更大的价值，促进了智能法规查询系统的更广泛应用。

journal_name: Journal of Construction Engineering and Management
title: Effects of Abusive Supervision on Construction Industry Workers’ Work Efficiency: A Study Based on EEG
abstract: Abusive supervision (AS) is an antiproductive behavior that significantly affects operational efficiency and employee performance, but its precise impact mechanism remains poorly understood. This study aimed to quantify the differential impact of active versus passive AS on construction workers’ work efficiency and verify the mediating role of cognitive states. Utilizing electroencephalogram (EEG) feature extraction integrated with cognitive science, we exposed 25 construction worker participants to randomized scenarios simulating active AS, passive AS, and control conditions. Behavioral performance data and cognitive state indicators were systematically collected and analyzed. AS significantly reduced work efficiency, with active AS having a greater impact than passive AS. AS was negatively correlated with attention and valence index, but positively correlated with mental fatigue. The adoption of EEG technology introduced a novel methodological approach to construction AS research, and this study empirically reveals the pathway through which AS impairs work efficiency via cognitive impairment. It provides a scientific foundation for developing targeted interventions to mitigate AS’s adverse effects on construction worker productivity.
title_cn: 虐待性监督对建筑行业工人工作效率的影响：基于脑电图的研究
abstract_cn: 虐待型监督（AS）是一种反生产性行为，显著影响操作效率和员工表现，但其具体影响机制仍不甚清晰。本研究旨在量化主动与消极虐待型监督对建筑工人工作效率的不同影响，并验证认知状态的中介作用。我们结合脑电图（EEG）特征提取与认知科学，对25名建筑工人参与者暴露于模拟主动AS、消极AS和控制条件的随机场景中。系统收集并分析了行为表现数据与认知状态指标。结果显示，AS显著降低了工作效率，其中主动AS的影响大于消极AS。AS与注意力和愉悦度指标呈负相关，而与心理疲劳呈正相关。EEG技术的采用为建筑领域的AS研究引入了一种新颖的方法论。本研究实证揭示了AS通过认知损害对工作效率的影响路径，为制定针对性干预措施以减轻AS对建筑工人生产力的不利影响提供了科学基础。

journal_name: Journal of Construction Engineering and Management
title: Blockchain-Based Time Impact Analysis Method for Sustainable Delay Management in EPC Projects
title_cn: 基于区块链的时间影响分析方法在工程采购建设项目可持续延误管理中的应用

journal_name: Journal of Construction Engineering and Management
title: Impact of ICT Function Use on Employees’ Job Performance in International Engineering Enterprises: A Configurational Perspective
abstract: The widespread application of information and communication technology (ICT) enhances the efficiency of information transmission across geographically dispersed organizations and reduces communication costs, providing opportunities for international engineering enterprises to effectively support overseas project departments. However, existing studies have also recognized the negative impacts of ICT use on overseas employees’ performance, such as causing information overload and increasing job stress on employees. Traditional linear analysis methods struggle to reveal the interactions between distinct ICT functions and lack differentiated explanations for ICT management tactics under varying contextual conditions. This study introduces a configurational perspective, analyzing survey data from 179 employees in overseas project departments of international engineering enterprises. By using fuzzy-set qualitative comparative analysis (fsQCA), this study systematically investigates the dynamic alignment patterns among ICT support, ICT control, ICT-induced job stress, project size, and job complexity. The study reveals complementary and substitutive relationships between ICT functions and their impact paths on job performance across different contexts. Key findings include: (1) Three pathways lead to the high job performance of employees in overseas project departments, with path selection influenced by contextual conditions, including project size and job complexity; (2) low job performance is not symmetrically related to high performance but arises from control failure (high-frequency control with high stress) or the absence of ICT support function; and (3) ICT-induced job stress primarily stems from control function, while support function mitigates such stress. The results provide theoretical insights into the interplay of ICT functions, contextual conditions, and their impacts on job performance. Practical guidance is offered for enterprises to optimize ICT use for enhanced employee performance.
title_cn: 信息通信技术功能使用对国际工程企业员工工作表现的影响：一种构型视角
abstract_cn: 信息与通信技术（ICT）的广泛应用提升了跨地域分散组织的信息传递效率，降低了沟通成本，为国际工程企业有效支持海外项目部门提供了机会。然而，现有研究也认识到ICT使用对海外员工绩效的负面影响，例如造成信息超载和增加员工工作压力。传统的线性分析方法难以揭示不同ICT功能之间的互动，且在不同情境条件下缺乏对ICT管理策略的差异化解释。本研究引入了一种配置视角，分析了来自179名国际工程企业海外项目部门员工的调查数据。通过使用模糊集定性比较分析（fsQCA），本研究系统地考察了ICT支持、ICT控制、ICT引发的工作压力、项目规模和工作复杂性之间的动态协调模式。研究揭示了ICT功能之间的互补和替代关系，以及它们对不同情境下工作绩效的影响路径。主要发现包括：（1）三条路径导致海外项目部门员工的高工作绩效，路径选择受项目规模和工作复杂性等情境条件的影响；（2）低工作绩效与高工作绩效并不是对称关系，而是由于控制失败（高频控制伴随高压力）或缺乏ICT支持功能所致；（3）ICT引发的工作压力主要源于控制功能，而支持功能则有助于缓解这种压力。研究结果为ICT功能、情境条件及其对工作绩效的影响提供了理论见解，并为企业优化ICT使用以提升员工绩效提供了实践指导。

journal_name: Journal of Construction Engineering and Management
title: Integrated Dual-Crane Positioning and Lifting Planning in Extreme Conditions: A Critical States and Spatial Constraint Optimization Approach
abstract: The intelligent planning of dual-crane cooperative lifting has emerged as a critical enabling technology for handling heavy and oversized payloads in complex engineering environments, particularly as infrastructure projects increase in scale and operational constraints become more challenging. However, existing planning methods neglect the critical influence of crane positioning on path feasibility. Besides, they remain inadequate for extreme conditions where payloads approach maximum capacity, and even minor swings may trigger catastrophic instability. This study proposes a hierarchical optimization framework for dual-crane positioning and lifting planning under such extreme scenarios, integrating critical states and spatial constraints. The upper layer systematically optimizes crane positions and motions by resolving geometric constraints between cranes and payloads, including working radii, boom lengths, slewing angles, and hoisting length. A weighted multiobjective function is formulated to balance energy consumption and time efficiency, and an improved A* algorithm is used to efficiently solve the integrated optimization problem through critical states discretization, where slewing motion is segmented into several phases. Furthermore, the lower layer enforces spatial synchronization through antiswing trajectory planning, where angular velocity profiles of both cranes are coordinated to maintain payload stability while adhering to crane-payload geometric constraints. Through simulation and software platform-based pseudo-experiments, the proposed method demonstrates a 66.57% improvement in computational efficiency and a 50.04% enhancement in safety performance compared to traditional approaches, while ensuring guaranteed collision avoidance and mechanical feasibility in extreme conditions. The proposed method significantly enhances safety and maximizes payload utilization under extreme conditions, providing a robust theoretical and practical framework that addresses fundamental challenges in modern dual-crane lifting operations.
topics: Dynamics and Control of Mechanical Systems
title_cn: 极端条件下的双吊车集成定位与提升规划：关键状态与空间约束优化方法
abstract_cn: 双起重机协作吊装的智能规划已成为在复杂工程环境中处理重型和超大负载的关键技术，尤其是在基础设施项目规模不断扩大、操作限制变得日益严峻的背景下。然而，现有的规划方法忽视了起重机定位对路径可行性的关键影响。此外，它们对于负载接近最大容量的极端条件也显得不足，甚至细小的摆动都可能引发灾难性的失稳。本研究提出了一种分层优化框架，用于在此类极端情况下进行双起重机的定位和吊装规划，集成了关键状态和空间约束。上层通过解决起重机与负载之间的几何约束（包括工作半径、臂长、回转角度和提升长度）系统地优化起重机的位置和运动。提出了一种加权多目标函数，以平衡能源消耗和时间效率，并利用改进的A*算法，通过关键状态离散化有效地解决集成优化问题，其中回转运动被分为几个阶段。此外，下层通过反摆轨迹规划强制实现空间同步，协调两台起重机的角速度轮廓，以维持负载的稳定，同时遵守起重机与负载的几何约束。通过仿真和基于软件平台的伪实验，所提出的方法在计算效率上比传统方法提高了66.57%，在安全性能上提升了50.04%，同时确保在极端条件下的碰撞避免和机械可行性。该方法显著提高了安全性，并在极端条件下最大化了负载的利用率，为解决现代双起重机吊装操作中的基本挑战提供了稳健的理论和实践框架。

title: ChatGPT as a Training Coach: Pattern-Specific Outcomes in Build America Buy America Act Training
abstract: This study explores the role of generative artificial intelligence (Gen-AI) as a compliance training agent by examining how interactive prompt patterns influence knowledge acquisition in the context of the Build America Buy America (BABA) Act. Amid growing interest in scalable, personalized learning tools, this experiment tests ChatGPT’s capacity to deliver regulatory education through adaptive coaching styles. The methodology integrates pre- and post-training assessments, control questions for knowledge retention, and coaching formats that range from scenario-based to interactive and gamified prompts. Results reveal that Gen-AI-driven training significantly improves compliance knowledge, particularly when prompt structures are aligned with learners’ prior understanding. Participants with low initial knowledge exhibited the greatest gains, indicating the value of real-time feedback and conversational scaffolding in supporting novice learners. Furthermore, control items confirm that learning was substantive rather than superficial, reinforcing Gen-AI’s potential for anchored instruction. However, the effectiveness of prompt types varied by knowledge tier, with structured formats outperforming more exploratory ones specifically among less-prepared participants. These findings carry meaningful implications for public-sector training: while Gen-AI training agents can extend access and personalize instruction, their design must consider learner readiness and cognitive load. The study also identifies prompt development as a core challenge, requiring balance between engagement, clarity, and instructional depth. As such, this research contributes both empirical evidence and practical guidance for integrating Gen-AI into compliance training, emphasizing the importance of pairing technological capability with pedagogical intent to ensure measurable learning outcomes.
topics: Artificial Intelligence in Healthcare and Education
title_cn: ChatGPT作为培训教练：《建造美国，购买美国法案》培训中的模式特定结果
abstract_cn: 本研究探讨了生成性人工智能（Gen-AI）作为合规培训代理的角色，通过考察互动提示模式如何影响《建设美国、购买美国法案》（BABA）的背景下的知识获取。在对可扩展、个性化学习工具日益增长的兴趣中，本实验测试了ChatGPT通过适应性辅导风格提供监管教育的能力。研究方法整合了培训前后评估、知识保留的控制问题以及从情景基础到互动和游戏化提示的多种辅导形式。结果表明，基于Gen-AI的培训显著提高了合规知识，尤其是当提示结构与学习者的先前理解相一致时。初始知识水平较低的参与者表现出最大的提升，这表明实时反馈和对话式支架在支持初学者方面的价值。此外，控制项目确认学习是实质性的，而非表面的，进一步强化了Gen-AI在巩固教学中的潜力。然而，不同提示类型的有效性因知识水平的差异而异，特别是在准备不足的参与者中，结构化格式的表现优于更探索性的格式。这些发现对公共部门培训具有重要的启示：尽管Gen-AI培训代理可以扩展访问和个性化教学，其设计必须考虑学习者的准备情况和认知负担。研究还指出提示开发是一个核心挑战，需要在参与性、清晰性和教学深度之间取得平衡。因此，本研究不仅为将Gen-AI整合到合规培训中提供了实证证据，也提供了实际指导，强调将技术能力与教育意图相结合的重要性，以确保可衡量的学习成果。

title: Maritime operations in ice-covered waters: A 25-year data-driven study of baltic sea ice conditions and icebreaker-ship operations
title_cn: 冰覆盖水域的海事操作：对波罗的海冰况和破冰船-船只操作的25年数据驱动研究

title: From detection to decision: integrating contextual metadata into an AI-based hospital hazard detection system
abstract: • Two-stage model integrates metadata to improve hospital hazard detection. • Reduces false detections by leveraging human expertise on hazard occurrences. • Enhanced cross-location generalization without model retraining. • Enables lower detection thresholds while maintaining high precision. • Various object detectors assessed on realistic indoor hazard scenarios. Maintaining environmental safety in hospitals is critical for preventing injuries and infections, yet manual monitoring is resource-intensive and prone to coverage gaps. This study presents a novel, two-stage AI framework for automated hazard detection. We first evaluated three state-of-the-art architectures—YOLOv8, DETR, and EfficientDet—finding that while all models demonstrated strong in-domain performance, they suffered significant accuracy loss in unseen areas due to domain shift. Among these models, YOLOv8 demonstrated superior baseline robustness. To address this generalization gap, we developed a second, metadata-augmented refinement layer that integrates hospital-specific spatial and temporal hazard information. Uniquely, this approach incorporates expert operational knowledge externally during inference rather than embedding it during training, thereby reducing the need for extensive annotated datasets or frequent model retraining. Experiments conducted in a major tertiary medical center demonstrate that metadata augmentation significantly improves detection reliability in cross-domain scenarios. The system operates effectively at lower objectiveness thresholds, achieving the high recall essential for safety–critical applications while simultaneously improving precision. Overall, the proposed framework offers a scalable and data-efficient solution for real-time environmental risk management. By bridging the gap between visual AI capabilities and the rigorous safety demands of healthcare facilities, it provides a practical pathway for enhancing hazard detection, situational awareness, and operational resilience.
topics: Artificial Intelligence in Healthcare and Education
title_cn: 从检测到决策：将上下文元数据整合进基于人工智能的医院危险检测系统
abstract_cn: • 两阶段模型整合元数据以提升医院危害检测。 • 通过利用人类在危害发生方面的专业知识减少误报。 • 在无需模型重训练的情况下增强跨地点的泛化能力。 • 实现较低的检测阈值，同时保持高精确度。 • 在现实室内危害场景中评估了多种物体检测器。 在医院中维护环境安全对于预防伤害和感染至关重要，然而手动监测资源消耗大且容易出现覆盖缺口。本研究提出了一种新颖的两阶段人工智能框架，用于自动化危害检测。我们首先评估了三种先进的架构——YOLOv8、DETR和EfficientDet，发现虽然所有模型在领域内表现出色，但由于领域迁移在未见区域存在显著的准确性损失。在这些模型中，YOLOv8展现了卓越的基线稳健性。为了解决这种泛化差距，我们开发了一个第二个增强元数据的细化层，该层整合了医院特定的时空危害信息。独特的是，这种方法在推理过程中外部引入专家的操作知识，而不是在训练期间进行嵌入，从而减少了对大量注释数据集或频繁模型重训练的需求。在一家大型三级医疗中心进行的实验表明，元数据增强显著改善了跨领域场景中的检测可靠性。该系统在较低的物体性阈值下有效运作，实现了对安全关键应用至关重要的高召回率，同时提高了精确度。总体而言，所提出的框架为实时环境风险管理提供了一种可扩展且数据高效的解决方案。通过弥合视觉人工智能能力与医疗设施严格安全需求之间的差距，它为提升危害检测、情境意识和操作韧性提供了切实可行的途径。

title: The ADAPTER-health questionnaire: A tool for measuring team resilience in healthcare
title_cn: ADAPTER健康问卷：用于测量医疗团队韧性的工具

title: Investigating the critical building layout features on the wayfinding process by integrating graph theory and virtual reality
title_cn: 通过整合图论和虚拟现实，研究影响路线导航过程的关键建筑布局特征

title: Hybrid deep reinforcement learning for optimizing electric vehicle charging station placement: Multi agent-based simulations using real-world data
title_cn: 混合深度强化学习在电动汽车充电站选址优化中的应用：基于多智能体的模拟与真实世界数据的结合
